notes: Offline four-baseline pilot. Runs all four systems (text_only_v1, code_only_v1, naive_concat_v1, full_method_v1) against the dev split with the stub provider. The primary purpose is CI coverage: every baseline must produce schema-valid generated outputs, a run_manifest, and a report row. Paper numbers are reportable only for (instance, system) pairs present in the benchmark-local annotation pack; this config's metric rows exist to prove the end-to-end pipeline is green for every baseline before the real providers are wired in.
